creator: dead_gardens_@hotmail.com
text:
> Hi=2C
>
> I can not reproduce this error on my system.
>
> Would you try again with make deinstall and make clean libevent ?
Hi=2C

Same error with make deinstall/clean=2C I had to comment the following line=
 in /etc/make.conf:"CFLAGS=3D -O2=A0-pipe=A0-fno-strict-aliasing"after that=
=2C tmux compiled without errors=A0(Thanks Chen Xie)

> wen
 		 	   		  =
